name: UI/UX review skill and reviewer sub-agent
description: Add a project-owned UI/UX review flow for independent screenshot or rendered-UI review. The new skill defines objective review priorities, anti-bias rules, rubric scoring, output format, and page-type checklists for mobile, dashboard, forms, navigation, and finance-app screens. The new sub-agent prompt defines a minimal-context ui-ux-reviewer persona that uses the skill without reading builder reasoning or redesigning from scratch.

planned: Used using-skills first and classified this as a Level 1 skill-maintenance task.
Read the project skill-maintenance rules and .agents README before adding new artifacts.
Adapted the requested .claude-style layout into the repo's portable .agents structure.
verification: Focused artifact checks passed: listed all new ui-ux-review skill/sub-agent files and parsed harness/feature_index.json plus harness/features/feat-069.json with Node JSON.parse.
Final gitnexus_detect_changes(scope: all) returned LOW risk with 2 changed indexed symbols across 3 indexed files and 0 affected processes.

notes: This feature adds reusable agent instructions only. It does not change application runtime behavior or product UI.
